title: bupleurum wolffianum
intro: Bupleurum wolffianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a type of thorny knawel. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum wolffianum include reducing fever, relieving symptoms of the common cold, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum wolffianum is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or dried root for use in herbal remedies.
